tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
policies: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan.
Basic plan users get email support during business hours.
All plans come with a 7-day money-back guarantee.
Users can upgrade or downgrade their plan at any time.

faq.question: What is AutoStream?
faq.answer: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools designed specifically for content creators. It helps creators save time by automating repetitive editing tasks.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports exporting videos optimized for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other major content platforms.

faq.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
faq.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Refunds are available within the first 7 days of purchase.
